heading: Regulations
label: 28k Regulations
text: The Secretary of the Interior shall promulgate rules and regulations to carry out the terms and conditions of sections 28f to 28k of this title as soon as practicable after .August 10, 1993
notes: Similar ProvisionsSimilar provisions were contained in , , , 1379.Pub. L. 102–381, title I106 Stat. 1378Oct. 5, 1992
